examples: money deducted but order not placed
transaction failed but amount got deducted
money got deducted but recharge failed
my card was charged but booking failed
intents.response: We detected a payment issue on your account. If money was deducted, it will be automatically reversed within 5-7 business days. Please share your transaction ID for faster resolution.

examples: when will I get my refund
I cancelled my order where is my money
intents.response: Refunds are typically processed within 5-7 business days after approval. If it has been more than 7 days, please contact your bank with the refund reference number we emailed you.

examples: I cannot login to my account
intents.response: For account access issues, please use the 'Forgot Password' option on the login page. If your account is locked or compromised, contact our security team immediately at security@support.com.
You can track your order in real-time from the 'My Orders' section. If your order is delayed beyond the estimated date, we will initiate an investigation and update you within 24 hours.

We apologize for the technical inconvenience. Our engineering team has been notified. Please try clearing your cache and restarting the app. If the issue persists, share a screenshot at tech@support.com.

examples: do you have a phone number
intents.response: Our support team is available 24/7 via chat and email. For phone support, call 1-800-SUPPORT between 9 AM - 6 PM EST. Visit our Help Center at help.support.com for detailed guides.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Go to the login page, click 'Forgot Password', enter your registered email, and follow the reset link sent to your inbox.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and digital wallets like PayPal and Google Pay.

faqs.question: How long does delivery take?
faqs.answer: Standard delivery takes 5-7 business days. Express delivery is available within 2-3 business days at an additional charge.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Orders can be cancelled within 24 hours of placement. After dispatch, cancellation is not possible but you can initiate a return.

faqs.question: Is my payment information secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use 256-bit SSL encryption and are PCI-DSS compliant. We never store your full card details on our servers.
